mechanism_narrative: A lower FEDFUNDS rate transmits into easier financial conditions and a higher present value of equities, so a falling policy rate should be followed by positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive more often than negative after monthly FEDFUNDS declines, or if the sign relation flips for more than one rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is still elevated while FEDFUNDS remains far below the inflation rate, real rates are deeply negative and the market should continue to reprice toward tighter policy, producing negative SPX returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation year-over-year exceeds FEDFUNDS by more than 2 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show negative 20-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening household income and demand, which should pressure earnings expectations and weigh on equities over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if month-over-month increases in UNRATE are not followed by below-median 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign is stable positive in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE combined with falling PAYEMS confirms a broad labor-market contraction, which should lead to negative S&P 500 performance over the next quarter as recession risk is priced in.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points in 3 months and PAYEMS falls over the same window
failure_condition: Reject if triggered periods fail to produce negative 60-day SPX returns more than half the time, or if labor weakness does not outperform a simple UNRATE-only signal.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating RSAFS indicates stronger consumer spending and revenue momentum, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next month through higher earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if positive changes in RSAFS are not associated with above-median 20-day SPX returns, or if the relationship is absent in a rolling 2-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO together with stable or falling CPIAUCSL indicates improving real output without inflation pressure, a mix that should support higher equity prices over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO is rising while CPIAUCSL inflation is flat or declining over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not deliver positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or if inflation-stable industrial upturns fail to outperform INDPRO alone.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST signals a weakening housing cycle and slower downstream demand, which should translate into negative S&P 500 returns over the next week as cyclical risk gets repriced quickly.
failure_condition: Reject if weekly declines in HOUST do not precede negative 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the signal is not distinct from random over any rolling 1-year window.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening regime, a simultaneous rise in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL implies policy is behind inflation, so discount rates and recession risk both rise; this should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint rise in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL does not coincide with below-average 20-day SPX returns, or if the effect disappears after controlling for FEDFUNDS alone.
